title: vitis × hispanica
intro: Vitis × hispanica, also known as Muscat grape, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Vitaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vitis × hispanica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Vitis × hispanica include wines, juices, and extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
